arts.ttl: Club World Cup: Predictions for Saturday's games
arts.sum: The second round of fixtures from Group E and F at the FIFA Club World Cup take centre stage on Saturday and Aaron Ashley previews all four of the day’s games.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Mamelodi Sundowns: Club World Cup preview, team news & predicted lineups
arts.sum: After a fortunate draw with Fluminense, Borussia Dortmund will hope to clinch their first win of the Club World Cup tournament.
